canonical_answer: A person wearing a purple long-sleeved top manipulates craft materials on a white table. They hold a teal masquerade mask with feathers and insert it into a round blue glittery base with zebra-patterned sides. A red hot glue gun rests on the table nearby. The person applies glue to secure the mask and later handles shiny blue foil squares.

question: Describe the specific steps shown for assembling the centerpiece kit, noting when instructions appear and when glue is used.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the design center title displays; at 10s, assembly instructions overlay the video; at 12s, a woman holds a blue mask near the base; at 16s, hot glue is applied to the hole; at 18s, the mask is reinserted into the glued base.

question: Walk through the visual changes from the intro screen to the final gluing step, highlighting key objects and actions.
canonical_answer: At 2s, white welcome text displays on black; at 10s, a woman appears with a blue glittery base; at 14s, hands stabilize a feathered mask on the stand; at 16s, a red glue gun applies adhesive; at 19s, the teal mask hangs over the base.
